modules.name: Word
modules.description: 10 integer types (U/Int 8-64, UWord, IWord), 4 arithmetic modes, numeric typeclasses

modules.name: Bit
modules.description: Boolean algebra, shifts, rotates, scanning, bit fields

modules.name: Memory
modules.description: Buffer, Ptr, LayoutDesc, region disjointness and algebra

modules.name: System
modules.description: File I/O state machine plus trusted OS boundary wrappers

modules.name: Concurrency
modules.description: C11 memory ordering specification model with trusted hardware assumptions

modules.name: BareMetal
modules.description: Bare-metal platform formalization: memory map, linker scripts, startup, GC-free

modules.name: Alignment
modules.description: alignUp/Down, isAligned, power-of-two fast paths, HasAlignment typeclass

modules.name: RingBuffer
modules.description: Fixed-capacity circular queue, push/pop/peek, FIFO ordering proofs

modules.name: Bitmap
modules.description: Dense bit-array (UInt64-backed), set operations, popcount, find-first

modules.name: CRC
modules.description: Table-driven CRC-32/CRC-16, GF(2) polynomial spec, streaming API

modules.name: MemoryPool
modules.description: Bump allocator, slab allocator, no-double-free/capacity-tracking proofs

modules.name: UTF8
modules.description: Verified Unicode scalar model, UTF-8 encoding/decoding, well-formedness checks

modules.name: ECC
modules.description: Hamming(7,4) parity model, syndrome computation, single-bit correction

modules.name: DMA
modules.description: Region-based DMA descriptors with coherence and atomicity validation

modules.name: Timer
modules.description: Monotonic clocks, deadlines, timeout helpers, expiry proofs

modules.name: ProofAutomation
modules.description: Reusable tactic macros for arithmetic and decision procedures
